name: Clams in Black Bean Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place clams on a steamer rack over water in a saucepan.
2. Cover and bring to boil. Cook 5 minutes, or just until shells open. Drain.
3. Combine broth, black bean sauce, sherry, cornstarch, and chili sauce; set aside.
4. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Add onion and ginger; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
6. Add clams and black bean sauce mixture; cook and stir for 30 seconds, or until the sauce boils and thickens and clams are hot.
7. Serve plain or over hot, cooked noodles, as desired.
